testcase.name: test_register_then_me
testcase.failure: tests/backend_test.py:84: in test_register_then_me assert r.status_code in (200, 201), r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":[{"type":"value_error","loc":["body","email"],"msg":"value is not a valid email address: The part after the @-sign is a special-use or reserved name that cannot be used with email.","input":"TEST_99281f2a@synaptiq.test","ctx":{"reason":"The part after the @-sign is a special-use or reserved name that cannot be used with email."}}]} E assert 422 in (200, 201) E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_login_elena_and_me

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'user' in {'academic_role': 'Associate Professor', 'availability': 'Available', 'avatar_url': 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1580894732444-8ecded7900cd?w=400&h=400&fit=crop', 'biography': 'Computational linguistics and ethical AI. PI of the SymGraph lab. ERC Starting Grant recipient.', ...}

testcase.name: test_tasks_crud
testcase.failure: tests/backend_test.py:299: in test_tasks_crud assert ru.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_send_message_and_thread
testcase.failure: tests/backend_test.py:330: in test_send_message_and_thread contents = [m.get("content") for m in rt.json()] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tests/backend_test.py:330: in <listcomp> contents = [m.get("content") for m in rt.json()] ^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'str' object has no attribute 'get'
